actions.noMonthlyPrice: No monthly Stripe price is configured for the displayed plans.

actions.stripePortalHelp: Plan and frequency changes are handled through the Stripe portal.

upgradeCard.title: Upgrade Required
upgradeCard.description: Your current plan does not include {feature}. Upgrade to unlock this feature.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I try it before I pay?
faq.a1: Yes. Every paid plan includes a free trial so you can explore the full feature set before being charged.
faq.q2: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a2: Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time from your billing settings. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.q3: What happens when I hit a usage limit?
faq.a3: You will see a prompt to upgrade. Your existing data is never deleted — you just need a higher plan to continue creating.
faq.a4: Plans are billed per team. Each team member is counted toward your plan's member limit. You can manage members from your team settings.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We use Stripe for payments. You can pay with any major credit or debit card. Invoices are available in your billing portal.

free.name: Free
free.description: For trying the starter without paid billing.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For solo builders and small teams shipping quickly.

team.name: Team
team.description: For teams that need seats, analytics, and higher limits.
